ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jun-02-2026 Continued To Jun-30-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar May-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sophia Cizmarik for Melissa Chung, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Melissa Chung was present in court.
Scott Pesetsky, Assignee (via Zoom).

Ms. Cizmarik informed the Court that although a competing petition had been previously filed by Eric Wanene, that competing petition has since been dismissed, and Ms. Chung remains the sole petitioner for appointment as administrator.

The Court inquired about the position of heir Ricardo Ragazzone. Mr. Pesetsky explained that Ricardo had expressed opposition to his siblings being appointed, but had not objected to the appointment of a professional fiduciary. Mr. Pesetsky further reported that Ricardo had experienced significant personal hardship, including homelessness and medical issues, and had recently been unresponsive despite efforts to reach him.

In the absence of any formal objections, the Court took the petition under submission with the intent to grant as prayed.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
